title: Aanazhagan
subTitle: Raja disguises himself as a married woman to find a rental house for his friends. However, trouble brews when he falls for the landlady's daughter.

title: Rathna
subTitle: Rathnavelu and Muthuvelu are twin brothers who get separated at birth when their parents are killed by an evil man. Rathnavelu grows up and decides to take revenge on the man who killed his parents.

title: Anbu Thollai
subTitle: Singamuthu wants him and his brothers to marry girls who are sisters. However, Chinnathayi, his cousin, wants to marry him and decides to jeopardise all the marriage proposals that come his way.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Valeba Raja
subTitle: When Karthik is confronted by a dilemma to choose between Sweety, a woman he loves, and Shaalu, a woman who is chosen by his parents, Dr Raja decides to help him.

title: Viralukketha Veekkam
subTitle: Three wives are disappointed with their husbands who borrow money from people to live luxuriously. After the women get employed to earn more, their spouses start plotting against them.

title: Athisaya Piravi
subTitle: Kaalaiyan falls in love with Sumathi, the daughter of a wealthy person, who kills him. Things change when Kaalaiyan is reincarnated as Balu.

title: Vathiyaar
subTitle: Annadurai, an ordinary school teacher, turns into a Good Samaritan and runs an orphanage after a tragic incident. However, his actions are closely watched by ACP Easwara Pandian and his team.

title: Karuppan
subTitle: A bold act during a traditional bull-taming event secures Karuppan's marriage, yet jealousy and betrayal slowly unravel the trust within the family.

title: Demonte Colony
subTitle: Four inebriated friends decide to do something adventurous and visit a haunted bungalow. However, when one of them steals a diamond necklace, their home becomes a hotbed for supernatural activity.

title: Demonte Colony
subTitle: Four inebriated friends decide to do something adventurous and visit a haunted bungalow. However, when one of them steals a diamond necklace, their home becomes a hotbed for supernatural activity.

title: Thondan
subTitle: Jeeva, an uneducated driver, cannot tolerate child labour and fights to eliminate it. Later, when Subha witnesses a murder and is in danger, Jeeva comes to her rescue.

title: Chinna Mani
subTitle: For years, Duraisamy Thevar's mother forces him to get married but he does not listen. Finally, when he decides to marry Chinna Mani, a widow, his family is shocked as she is supposedly unlucky.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Vanakkam Chennai
subTitle: Ajay and Anjali are forced to share the same apartment after a sly broker cheats them. Subsequently, as they team up to track him down, they catch feelings for each other.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
subTitle: Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, the ruler of the Rayalaseema region, resists the tyranny of the East India Company and sparks a revolution in the process.

title: Sandakozhi
subTitle: Balu, on a visit to his friend's hometown, falls for the latter's sister, Hema. However, when he learns that the area is ruled by a local gangster, Kasi, Balu teaches him a lesson.

title: Vaathi
subTitle: When a private teacher is posted to a government school, he decides to fight for education after noticing its neglected state and faces the odds.

title: Natpe Thunai
subTitle: Prabhakaran, a former hockey player, helps a local team save their ground by training them to win a match against the Pondicherry team. However, a corrupt politician has his eyes set on the ground.

title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
subTitle: Suresh faces opposition from the father of the woman he loves, who refuses their marriage proposal. However, fate has other plans for him.

title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
subTitle: Suresh faces opposition from the father of the woman he loves, who refuses their marriage proposal. However, fate has other plans for him.

title: Karisakaattu Poove
subTitle: Pounraasu, who is secretly in love with Nagamani, chooses to remain silent when her marriage is fixed with his elder brother since he does not want to come in the way of his elder brother's happiness.

title: Kama Raasu
subTitle: Kamarasu, a dedicated driver at Latha's house, selflessly aids those in need. However, his life takes a dramatic turn after the tragic loss of his mother and lover.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Asathal
subTitle: Vetri and his two best friends live together and follow a carefree lifestyle. However, things become complicated when they encounter an abandoned baby at their doorstep.

title: Thaimel Aanai
subTitle: Young Raja resolves to exact revenge for his mother's and sister's deaths. Nevertheless, his law-abiding police officer friend is unwilling to allow him to enforce the law on his own.

title: Per Sollum Pillai
subTitle: Rajalakshmi raises Ramu, an orphan, as her own son who in turn always protects his foster family. However, he must stop his malicious foster brothers from marrying off their sister to a gangster.

title: Sundara Purushan
subTitle: A man loves his cousin, but circumstances force him to leave home. Years later, when he learns that she loves someone else, he tries to help her reunite with her lover.

title: Arasu
subTitle: Thirunavukkarasu, a soft-spoken man, has two good-natured parents who are involved in the upliftment of society. However, when his parents are brutally assassinated, he seeks revenge for their deaths.

title: February 14
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, begins his college education and falls for Pooja, an American girl who is in India to complete her graduation. However, things become complicated when she wants to go back.
